Our Story

A Legacy of Beauty & Trust

For over 27 years, Laika's Beauty Parlour has been a cherished name in Islamabad's beauty landscape. Founded with a deep passion for artistry and a commitment to personalized care, we have grown from a neighbourhood parlour into a trusted destination for women seeking elegant, professional beauty services.

Located in the heart of G-7/3-1, Sitara Market, our parlour is more than a salon — it is a sanctuary where every client is treated with warmth, expertise, and undivided attention. We believe that beauty is not just about appearance; it is about confidence, self-expression, and feeling truly cared for.

From bridal transformations to everyday grooming, our experienced team brings decades of refined skill and a love for their craft to every appointment.
